items: Brett Sullivan homered 2 times in Chicago Cubs's 9-3 win over Colorado.
Miami pitching combined to shut out Arizona, 2-0.
Detroit pitching combined to shut out Minnesota, 11-0.
Chicago White Sox pitching combined to shut out Atlanta, 0-0.
Jakob Marsee, Otto Lopez combined for 3 stolen bases.
The Mets walked off St. Louis, 5-4.
